author.bio: Columnist @gazettedotcom. Writer @CJR. Author of God Land from @IUpress. Belabored from @BoldTypeBooks August 11, 2020. she/her. Sweetheart & leftist harpie.
author.name: Lyz Lenz

content.text: My kids and I are on the last chapter of the last Harry Potter book. A journey we began in July of 2019. And before the chapter began my 8yo shook my hand and said, "mom, it's been an honor." And this is exactly how I imagined parenting would be.
